description: Multi-broadcast fusion timing estimate with comprehensive uncertainty budget and per-station breakdowns

fields.name: timestamp_utc
fields.description: Measurement timestamp in UTC

fields.name: minute_boundary
fields.description: Unix epoch timestamp of minute boundary

fields.name: d_clock_fused_ms
fields.description: Fused D_clock estimate (calibrated, weighted mean)

fields.name: d_clock_raw_ms
fields.description: Raw D_clock estimate (unweighted mean, before calibration)

fields.name: uncertainty_ms
fields.description: Combined uncertainty (RSS of statistical, systematic, propagation)

fields.name: statistical_uncertainty_ms
fields.description: Statistical uncertainty (measurement scatter, weighted std dev)

fields.name: systematic_uncertainty_ms
fields.description: Systematic uncertainty (calibration convergence error)

fields.name: propagation_uncertainty_ms
fields.description: Propagation uncertainty (mode-dependent ionospheric variability)

fields.name: n_broadcasts
fields.description: Number of broadcast measurements in fusion

fields.name: n_stations
fields.description: Number of unique stations in fusion

fields.name: stations_used
fields.description: Comma-separated list of stations contributing to fusion

fields.name: wwv_mean_ms
fields.description: Mean D_clock from WWV broadcasts

fields.name: wwvh_mean_ms
fields.description: Mean D_clock from WWVH broadcasts

fields.name: chu_mean_ms
fields.description: Mean D_clock from CHU broadcasts

fields.name: bpm_mean_ms
fields.description: Mean D_clock from BPM broadcasts

fields.name: wwv_count
fields.description: Number of WWV broadcasts in fusion

fields.name: wwvh_count
fields.description: Number of WWVH broadcasts in fusion

fields.name: chu_count
fields.description: Number of CHU broadcasts in fusion

fields.name: bpm_count
fields.description: Number of BPM broadcasts in fusion

fields.name: wwv_intra_std_ms
fields.description: Intra-station standard deviation for WWV broadcasts

fields.name: wwvh_intra_std_ms
fields.description: Intra-station standard deviation for WWVH broadcasts

fields.name: chu_intra_std_ms
fields.description: Intra-station standard deviation for CHU broadcasts

fields.name: bpm_intra_std_ms
fields.description: Intra-station standard deviation for BPM broadcasts

fields.name: inter_station_spread_ms
fields.description: Spread between station mean D_clock values

fields.name: consistency_flag
fields.description: Consistency check result

fields.name: global_solve_verified
fields.description: Whether global differential solve was performed and verified

fields.name: global_solve_consistency_ms
fields.description: Consistency metric from global solve

fields.name: global_solve_n_obs
fields.description: Number of observations in global solve

fields.name: calibration_applied
fields.description: Whether per-broadcast calibration was applied

fields.name: reference_station
fields.description: Reference station for calibration

fields.name: outliers_rejected
fields.description: Number of outlier measurements rejected via MAD filter

fields.name: quality_grade
fields.description: Quality grade based on uncertainty and broadcast count

fields.name: kalman_state
fields.description: Convergence state (mapped from broadcast count and uncertainty)

fields.name: quality_flag
fields.description: Overall data quality flag

fields.name: processing_version
fields.description: Fusion engine version

fields.name: single_station_mode
fields.description: True if only one station available (no cross-validation possible, systematic errors undetectable)

fields.name: d_clock_l1_ms
fields.description: L1-only fusion D_clock (raw metrology, no L2 calibration)

fields.name: d_clock_l2_ms
fields.description: L2 fusion D_clock (calibrated, with propagation corrections)

fields.name: l1_l2_difference_ms
fields.description: L1 - L2 difference (reveals propagation correction quality)

fields.name: calibration_age_hours
fields.description: Age of calibration data in hours (freshness indicator)

fields.name: calibration_n_samples
fields.description: Total samples used in calibration learning

fields.name: calibration_converged
fields.description: True if calibration has converged (sufficient samples, low uncertainty)

fields.name: multipath_detected_count
fields.description: Number of measurements with multipath detected

fields.name: multipath_mean_delay_spread_ms
fields.description: Mean multipath delay spread across measurements

fields.name: doppler_mean_hz
fields.description: Mean Doppler shift across measurements

fields.name: doppler_correction_applied_ms
fields.description: Total Doppler timing correction applied

fields.name: cramer_rao_mean_ms
fields.description: Mean Cramér-Rao bound uncertainty across measurements

fields.name: propagation_modes_used
fields.description: Comma-separated list of propagation modes identified (e.g., '1F2,2F2,GW')

fields.name: dominant_propagation_mode
fields.description: Most common propagation mode in this fusion window

fields.name: adev_60s
fields.description: Allan deviation at tau=60s (fractional frequency stability)

fields.name: adev_1000s
fields.description: Allan deviation at tau=1000s (fractional frequency stability)

quality_flags.GOOD: Grade A or B, LOCKED state, n_stations >= 2
quality_flags.MARGINAL: Grade C, or ACQUIRING state, n_stations >= 1
quality_flags.BAD: Grade D, or REACQUIRING state, or uncertainty >= 2 ms

consistency_flags.INTER_ANOMALY: Large inter-station spread (calibration or discrimination issue)

uncertainty_calculation.description: Root sum of squares (RSS) of uncertainty components
uncertainty_calculation.statistical: Weighted standard deviation of broadcast measurements
